chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. S – 256 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case For hearing of CMA No.394/2025 (C/A) 20.06.2025 Mr. Badaruddin Indher, Advocate for petitioner / applicant. Mr. Shahryar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This contempt application arises out of earlier proceedings wherein the main petition was disposed of by this Court on 07.02.2025 with a direction to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law. Today, two Inspectors are present; the previous SHO of Police Station Sangi, Ghulam Muhammad Bozdar, and the current SHO, Akhtiar Ahmed Mangrio. Both officials have filed their respective statements, which are taken on record. Inspector Ghulam Muhammad Bozdar has stated that he is no longer posted as SHO of Police Station Sangi, whereas Inspector Akhtiar Ahmed Mangrio has submitted that he is newly posted at said police station. Perusal of the last order dated 07.02.2025 reflects that the grievance of the petitioner was based on alleged harassment by the then SHO, who, as confirmed, is no longer holding that position. In view of the foregoing, and since the alleged contemnor No.1 is no longer serving as SHO, the contempt application stands disposed of. However, both Inspectors in attendance are directed to act strictly in accordance with law and ensure that no harassment is caused to the petitioner. J U D G E Abdul Basit
